studies.title: Effectiveness of an app-based intervention for the treatment of patients with a depressive disorder - A randomized controlled trial

_verification.reason: The study is about a digital therapeutic named 'Invirto - Die Therapie gegen Depression', which is distinct from 'Invirto - Die Therapie gegen Angst'. The study focuses on depression, not anxiety disorders.

studies.title: Evaluation of "Invirto aftercare" for anxiety disorders: a pilot study.

_verification.reason: The study is specifically about 'Invirto Aftercare', which is a variation of the product name 'Invirto - Die Therapie gegen Angst'. The study investigates the feasibility, acceptance, safety, and efficacy of this app-based aftercare therapy for anxiety disorders, clearly linking it to the Invirto product line.

_classification.reason: The study is described as a pilot study aiming to evaluate feasibility, acceptance, and safety, but it lacks details on randomization or control groups, and appears to be a protocol without results. It is not a primary RCT or RWE study.

studies._rejection_reason: The study is described as a pilot study aiming to evaluate feasibility, acceptance, and safety, but it lacks details on randomization or control groups, and appears to be a protocol without results. It is not a primary RCT or RWE study.
